description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a vibrant lavender color scheme with playful cartoon characters depicted on both side panels, each character appearing to float among white clouds. The front panel displays the text 'BTS JUMP' and 'START GAME' on a blue background with white clouds, evoking a whimsical, inviting atmosphere. The control panel is equipped with two pink joysticks and six pink buttons, suggesting a two-player setup. The cabinet is boxy and upright, with a flat top and a large, vertically oriented screen. The surface appears smooth and glossy, with the artwork seamlessly integrated into the exterior. No coin slot is visible, and the back panel is plain lavender with no additional features.
description: A lavender arcade game cabinet with cartoon cloud and character artwork, a blue cloud-themed screen, and a two-player pink control panel.
description_view_0: Left side view showing three cartoon characters floating among clouds on a lavender background.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the 'BTS JUMP' game title, blue cloud-themed screen, and two-player pink control panel.
description_view_2: Right side view with three different cartoon characters floating among clouds on a lavender background.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain lavender panel with no artwork or features.
attribute_screen_type: unknown (screen is flat, large, and vertically oriented with a visible bezel, but display technology is not visually identifiable)
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two pink joysticks and six pink buttons arranged in two-player side-by-side layout, with controls symmetrically placed and no visible trackballs or spinners.
attribute_marquee_artwork: None; the top of the cabinet is plain lavender with no illuminated marquee or additional artwork.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels feature colorful cartoon characters floating among white clouds on a lavender background, with playful and whimsical themes.
